description: Query the status and results of a run_tasks task. Returns aggregate results by default (status, total, completed, failed). Add 'query_sub_task: true' to get detailed sub-task results (may be large). You can also pass multiple IDs in task_ids array to query several at once.
name: query_task

query_sub_task.description: If true, include detailed sub-task results. Default: false (aggregate only)
